Research & Development

Engineering
Excellence.

From concept to production. Providing high-end hardware design and embedded software solutions for industrial leaders.

The Lab

Advanced Facilities.

Our Bengaluru R&D center is equipped with state-of-the-art testing and prototyping infrastructure. We specialize in ruggedized industrial electronics and automotive-grade embedded systems.

Hardware Design

Multi-layer PCB design, analog/digital integration, and high-speed signal integrity matching.

Firmware Development

Bare-metal optimization, RTOS implementation (FreeRTOS), and embedded Linux customization.

Wireless Ecosystem

Expertise in LoRaWAN long-range, NB-IoT cellular, BLE, and proprietary sub-GHz stacks.

Rapid Prototyping

In-house lab infrastructure for functional testing, environmental stress tests, and pilot production.

Focus Domains

Expertise across
Mission-Critical Sectors.

Automotive

Body control modules, instrument clusters, and infotainment bridge systems.

EV Infrastructure

High-power charging station controllers and advanced BMS solutions.

Industrial IoT

Secure gateway devices, remote monitoring nodes, and mesh sensor networks.

CAPABILITIES

Design & Development

Arbutus also provides Ready Reckoner Solutions in different Verticals to meet wide customer requirements. ARBUTUS is a One-stop Sourcing and Design Solution provider for electronic products.

One-stop Sourcing & Design Solution provider
